pv-cargo.name: Fix AGW A2A config and deploy CLI runners

dispatch_inputs.name: deploy_cli_runners
dispatch_inputs.description: Deploy claude-code and codex-cli A2A nodes

dispatch_inputs.name: channels
dispatch_inputs.description: CRX channels to probe (comma-separated, e.g. stable,dev,canary)

dispatch_inputs.name: strict
dispatch_inputs.description: Fail the job on drift (default true)

dispatch_inputs.name: force_notify
dispatch_inputs.description: Always send notification even if no drift

dispatch_inputs.name: force_notify
dispatch_inputs.description: Notify even if all checks pass

dispatch_inputs.name: reload_agentgateway
dispatch_inputs.description: Reload AgentGateway after MCP config sync

dispatch_inputs.name: deploy_wave_403
dispatch_inputs.description: Deploy Wave-403 pydantic-ai supervisor to pv-cargo

dispatch_inputs.name: extra_args
dispatch_inputs.description: Extra arguments passed to the task

dispatch_inputs.name: pubkey
dispatch_inputs.description: SSH public key to authorize on pv-cargo for user pv

dispatch_inputs.name: dry_run
dispatch_inputs.description: Dry run (print changes without writing to DB)

dispatch_inputs.name: backfill_mode
dispatch_inputs.description: Sync mode. on-touch (default): edges written only when entity content changed. full-backfill: retroactive pass over all entities (ops-only, never available to scheduled cron).

dispatch_inputs.name: issue_number
dispatch_inputs.description: GitHub issue number to fix (body becomes chain goal)

dispatch_inputs.name: badge
dispatch_inputs.description: X-Pplx-Badge label shown in the Perplexity UI

dispatch_inputs.name: intent
dispatch_inputs.description: Intent to lazy-run (or "all" for every intent)

web.name: Check agentgateway version + http target docs

dispatch_inputs.name: force_version
dispatch_inputs.description: Force a specific Comet version (skips ingest no-op check)

dispatch_inputs.name: force
dispatch_inputs.description: Re-embed all entities (even with existing embeddings)

dispatch_inputs.name: force
dispatch_inputs.description: Re-embed all entities (even with existing embeddings)

dispatch_inputs.name: pytest_extra
dispatch_inputs.description: Extra pytest args (default: -v -rs to print skip reasons)

dispatch_inputs.name: deploy_before_run
dispatch_inputs.description: Sync /home/pv/pplx-lab to this branch+SHA and restart agentgateway before the hop matrix

dispatch_inputs.name: install_node
dispatch_inputs.description: Install Node.js 22 on the runner (enables H0b @modelcontextprotocol/conformance; v22+ required for fs.globSync)

dispatch_inputs.name: force-refresh
dispatch_inputs.description: Force re-download even if cache key matches

dispatch_inputs.name: dry_run
dispatch_inputs.description: Build artifacts but skip Resend + beacon tag

dispatch_inputs.name: skip_if_recent
dispatch_inputs.description: Abort if another runner just emitted a digest

dispatch_inputs.name: bundle_source
dispatch_inputs.description: Bundle source: fetch (live from perplexity.ai) | local (use research/extracted/comet/latest)

dispatch_inputs.name: version
dispatch_inputs.description: Fallback version tag if meta absent

dispatch_inputs.name: version
dispatch_inputs.description: Fallback version if meta tag absent

dispatch_inputs.name: force_crx_update
dispatch_inputs.description: Force CRX re-download even if version unchanged

dispatch_inputs.name: run_minutes
dispatch_inputs.description: How long to hold the tunnel running (max ~330 on GHA free)
